seo.title: Construction coordination platform
seo.description: EdilSync centralizes communication and planning for contractors, owners, and subcontractors.
seo.softwareDescription: Construction software to centralize communication, planning, and traceable execution.

hero.subtitle: EdilSync brings owners, contractors, subcontractors, and professionals into one platform. Fewer calls, fewer misunderstandings, more control.
hero.note: Personal or company account · No card required to start · Upgrade when needed

highlights.alignmentText: One place for tasks, photos, change requests, and project conversations.
highlights.traceabilityText: Every action becomes usable evidence for decisions, work progress, and disputes.
highlights.controlText: Fewer clarification calls, fewer wasted trips, fewer gray areas.

preview.alt: EdilSync interface for coordinating the construction site
preview.feedTitle: Status, accountability, and approvals in the same operating flow.
preview.feedText: The owner sees progress and decisions. The contractor keeps context without chasing chats and attachments.
preview.fieldReadyText: To update status, attach a photo, or answer a change request.

stats.aLabel: Lost every year because of poor communication
stats.bLabel: Of projects miss expected quality standards
stats.cLabel: Lost weekly to conflicts and rework
stats.dLabel: Of rework tied to inadequate communication

problem.title: Construction communication is chaotic
problem.subtitle: Every day, different tools are used to run construction work, but the result is misalignment and communication outside the right context.
problem.c1d: Information gets lost across private chats, groups, and endless threads. Finding that important conversation from 3 weeks ago becomes impossible.
problem.c2d: The owner calls for updates. Subcontractors call to coordinate. Every interruption costs about 15 minutes of productivity.
problem.c3d: Undocumented changes turn into disputes. With 3-5% margins, a single misunderstanding can wipe out the profit of the whole project.
problem.c4d: Who caused the delay? The supplier? The client who did not choose materials? Without documentation, blame always falls on the contractor.
problem.c5d: The electrician arrives but the previous work is not finished. Every wasted trip costs $100-200, multiplied dozens of times each year.
problem.c6d: The owner does not know what is happening, feels anxious, and keeps calling. Not out of mistrust, but because no tool gives real transparency.

solution.title: One shared space for every stakeholder
solution.subtitle: A contextual platform where roles, permissions, and responsibilities adapt by project and workflow.
solution.s1d: The contractor creates the site and invites owners, subcontractors, and professionals in one click.
solution.s2d: Every action - photos, tasks, changes, messages - automatically becomes traceable documentation.
solution.s3d: Everyone sees the same project state. Zero ambiguity.

result.label: Operational result
result.title: Everyone sees the same site without chasing updates.
result.b1: The owner follows progress and decisions without constant phone calls.
result.b2: The contractor coordinates tasks, photo evidence, and change requests in the same flow.
result.b3: The subcontractor sees only what is needed, when it is needed.

features.title: Everything your site needs
features.subtitle: Tasks, photos, changes, chat, and financial control in one integrated flow.
features.f1d: Organize work by rooms, phases, and milestones. Blocked status with tagged ownership to document who causes delays.
features.f2d: Captured photos automatically become part of the project. Timestamp, task-based organization, and built-in legal protection.
features.f3d: Every change is tracked with cost and timeline impact. The owner approves or rejects. No more disputes like 'I thought it was included'.
features.f4d: Project messages with references to tasks, milestones, and documents. Replaces WhatsApp while keeping everything in the right context.
features.f5d: Coordinate visits, teams, and deadlines with conflict detection.
features.f6d: Formalize disputes with timeline, evidence, comments, and states.
features.f7d: Budget, costs, rates, and work progress statements. The owner sees progress while the contractor manages financial control.
features.f8d: GPS optional clock-in/out linked to project costs.

why.title: Not another generic management tool
why.w1d: The only tool built around contractor protection. Automatic documentation protects both sides without extra work.
why.w2d: Designed for the jobsite, not the office desk. Upload photos in 3 taps, update status in 3 taps. If mobile has friction, it fails.
why.w3d: If it takes more than 5 minutes to understand, we did it wrong. Clear interfaces, no hidden functionality, same model for every role.
why.w4d: You do not need to 'write updates'. Your actions - photos, task updates, approvals - automatically become the project feed.

audience.title: Designed for every role on site
audience.subtitle: Same tool, role-adapted interface. No one needs to learn from scratch.
audience.micheleQuote: "I am not late - I am waiting for the client to choose tiles for three weeks."
audience.matteoQuote: "I am spending €40,000 on my kitchen and I have no idea what is happening."
audience.marcoQuote: "I arrive on site and previous work is not finished. Another wasted trip."
audience.m1: Document everything automatically without extra work
audience.m2: Protect margin with traceable change requests
audience.t2: Know exactly when progress is expected
audience.t3: No surprises on unapproved extra costs
audience.t4: Free access on the project you are invited to
audience.r1: See only tasks and deadlines relevant to you
audience.r2: Avoid wasted trips with shared calendar
audience.r3: Project chat without sharing personal number

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Private owners stay free. Companies can be free or Pro. Premium project capabilities unlock through sponsorship.
pricing.priceNote: Company premium with project sponsorship. No card required to get started.
pricing.noCard: No card required to get started
pricing.included: EdilSync Pro unlocks for the company and sponsored projects:
pricing.p2: Project sponsorship and project premium on sponsored projects
pricing.p3: On sponsored projects: tasks, milestones, and change requests
pricing.p4: Company chat and, on sponsored projects, contextual project chat
pricing.p6: On sponsored projects: document management with revisions
pricing.p7: On sponsored projects: dispute module and document protection
pricing.p8: On sponsored projects: project financial control
pricing.p9: On sponsored projects: attendance and project clock-in

explainer.freeText: Homeowners, subcontractors, and invited professionals can join the project for free. A company can also remain free until it needs premium capabilities.
explainer.companyText: Only the company that wants the Pro plan pays: it unlocks company premium, the premium operative workspace, and the ability to sponsor projects.
explainer.projectText: Milestones, financial control, advanced documents, disputes, and full project chat activate when a Pro company sponsors that specific project.

access.label: Billing logic
access.title: One company plan. Free access for everyone else.
access.i1: Homeowners and invited collaborators stay free
access.i2: Only the company pays when it needs premium company tools
access.i3: Sponsored projects unlock advanced shared project areas

pricing.hint: per year can repay the whole subscription.
pricing.hintSub: About $230/year: the cost of a single wasted trip.

final.title: Ready to bring order to your construction site?
final.text: Stop wasting time across chats, email, and phone calls. Start with EdilSync today and feel the difference from day one.
